text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Every day, you're as busy as a bee. You've got
your nose to the grindstone, earning my utmost
respect. Please keep up all the fine work.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you. I've got to say, it's such an
honor for you to wish me a happy birthday,
Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But you'd better watch out. If you keep acting so
confident in your lead, one day I might just take a
big bite out of you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've never once felt at ease when up against you.
However kind and gentle at first glance, a beast
is still a beast.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I won't lie there smiling and let myself be gobbled
up without a fight. They call me "Emperor" for a
reason.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, you never know. You might not see the
beast coming until you're in its jaws.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That won't happen. I'll heroically face the
speeding beast head-on, defeat it, and
demonstrate my authority as Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So I hope you will continue to be a beast worth
defeating. I wouldn't have it any other way.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll have to live up to that, then. Once I
start dazzling you, you won't know what hit
you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I look forward to it, Beast.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Don't let your guard down, Emperor. ♪
